response.justification: Strong generalist software engineer with 13+ years of experience, recent exposure to MCP code generators and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq, and solid TypeScript/Node.js/cloud background. However, the resume shows limited depth in production GenAI systems, RAG architectures, vector databases, and Python — all core requirements. The AI-agent work appears recent and infrastructure-adjacent rather than 8+ years of shipping production AI solutions, which is the explicit minimum bar.
strengths: Recent hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Strong full-stack and cloud delivery background (TypeScript, Node.js, AWS CDK, Kubernetes)
Demonstrated technical leadership: workshops, talks, mentoring, open-source platform ownership
concerns: No clear evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI/ML systems
Python, vector databases, and RAG architectures are not listed in skills or experience
Customer-facing forward-deployed/discovery experience with enterprise stakeholders not demonstrated
